title: TTRWIN Scented Candles Gift Set, 4 Pack Natural Soy Candles: Jasmine & Ylang Ylang, Sandalwood & Patchouli, Fir & Cedarwood, Vanilla & Amber, Aromatherapy Gift for Christmas Birthday
features: Multipack small secnted candles with different classic fragrances: Jasmine & Ylang Ylang, Sandalwood & Patchouli, Fir & Cedarwood, Vanilla & Amber. For home scented, and stress relief.
Vegan candles made of natural soy wax and pure essential oil, lighted by lead-free cotton wick, your sweet, clean and fresh air maker.
Weight net 100g for each candle, about 25 hours scented burning, avoiding vents and trimming the wick regularly will achieve a longer and more stable burning.
Solide made glass jar, with screw-twist metal lid, to preserve the fragrance and anti-dust, allow for reusable and portable use. The empty glass jar can be used as an accessory storage.
Elegant wrapping, this set of candles is a great gift idea in any occasions, for Christmas, birthday, anniversary, wedding, giveaways & giveback, housewarming etc.
description: Product Description Never light the candle in a sealed room. Keep the burning candle within sight to avoid unforeseen damage. Keep it away from objects that can catch fire. Keep it out of reach of children and pets. Place the candle on a heat-resistant surface. Do not burn for more than 2 hours at a time. Cut the wick to a length of 0.5 cm for a longer and evener burn. Extinguish the candle by closing the lid. TTRWIN 4 Pack Scented Candles Set, MIXED-FRAGRANCES, balance of sweet/floral/woodsy/natural AROMATHERAPY CANDLES Vegan scented candle made of natural soy wax and pure essential oils, clean burning by it's cotton wick. With a quietly burning cute flame, full your space with romantic and ethereal energy. Different fragrances for different occasions: bedroom/bathroom/living room/office/party/yoga room etc. Very well packaged Suitable for gifting TTRWIN SCENTED CANDLES GIFT SET --- 4 small candles with different scents VANILLA-AMBER: warm sweet fragrance, gives you a sense of full security and comfort. Great for reducing stress, soothing emotions, promoting sleep. JASMINE-YLANG YLANG: floral scent, helping hormones balance, gives you a sense of full relaxation and comfort. FIR-CEDAR: woody fragrance comes from a snowy forest, giving a clean, fresh energy that quickly settles anxious emotions. SANDALWOOD-PATCHOULI: mystical oriental notes, for staying pleasant, sobering and stress-relieving. -100g, 3.5Oz for each candle. -About 25 hours burning time for each candle -Solid made glass jar -With screw-twist metal lid
